title: xanthisma johnstonii
intro: Xanthisma johnstonii, also known as Johnston's brittle prickly-phlored, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This shrubby perennial plant is a member of the sunflower family, producing yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Xanthisma johnstonii are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular choice for herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
